step_zero.title: Welcome to your workspace
step_zero.description: To help you get started, we’ve created a Demo IPO Workspace for you. Let’s add your first Compliance Task.

step_one.title: Click “+ Add Compliance Task”
step_one.description: Start by clicking the “+ New Work Item” button. You can create Compliance Tasks, bugs, or custom type that fits your needs.

step_two.title: Filter Compliance Tasks items
step_two.description: Use filters to quickly narrow down your list. You can filter by IPO Readiness, priority, or team members.

step_three.title: View, group, and order Compliance Tasks as needed.
step_three.description: See required properties, and group or order Compliance Tasks as per your needs.

step_four.title: Visualize however you want
step_four.description: Select which properties you want to see in the list. You can also group and sort Compliance Tasks your way.

step_zero.title: Make progress with IPO Readiness
step_zero.description: Press Q to create a IPO Readiness. Name it and set dates—only one IPO Readiness per IPO Workspace.

step_one.title: Create a new IPO Readiness
step_one.description: Press Q to create a IPO Readiness. Name it and set dates—only one IPO Readiness per IPO Workspace.

step_two.title: Click “+ ”
step_two.description: Start by clicking the “+” button. Add new or existing Compliance Tasks directly from the IPO Readiness Company Record.

step_three.title: IPO Readiness summary
step_three.description: Track IPO Readiness progress, team productivity, and priorities—and investigate if things fall behind.

step_four.title: Transfer Compliance Tasks
step_four.description: After the due date, a IPO Readiness auto-completes. Move unfinished work to another IPO Readiness.

step_zero.title: Break your IPO Workspace down into Tasks
step_zero.description: Tasks are smaller, focused IPO Workspaces that help users group and organize Compliance Tasks within specific time frames.

step_one.title: Create Task
step_one.description: Tasks are smaller, focused IPO Workspaces that help users group and organize Compliance Tasks within specific time frames.

step_two.title: Click “+ ”
step_two.description: Start by clicking the “+” button. Add new or existing Compliance Tasks directly from the Task Company Record.

step_three.title: Task states
step_three.description: Tasks use these statuses to help users plan and clearly track progress and stage.

step_four.title: Task progress
step_four.description: Task progress is tracked via IPO Ready items, with Risk Assessment to monitor performance.

step_zero.title: Document with AI-powered Company Records
step_zero.description: Company Records in Trinity Intelligence let you capture, organize, and collaborate on IPO Workspace info—no external tools needed.

step_one.title: Make Company Record Public or Private
step_one.description: Company Records can be set as public, visible to everyone in your workspace, or private, accessible only to you.

step_two.title: Use / command
step_two.description: Use / on a Company Record to add content from 16 block types, including lists, images, tables, and embeds.

step_three.title: Company Record actions
step_three.description: Once your Company Record is created, you can click the ••• menu in the top-right corner to perform the following actions.

step_four.title: Table of contents
step_four.description: Get a bird’s-eye view of your Company Record by clicking the panel icon to see all headings.

step_five.title: Version history
step_five.description: Company Records track all edits with version history, letting you restore previous versions if needed.

step_zero.title: Streamline requests with intake
step_zero.description: A Trinity Intelligence-only feature that lets Guests create Compliance Tasks for bugs, requests, or tickets.

step_one.title: Open/closed intake requests
step_one.description: Pending requests stay in the Open tab, and once addressed by an admin or member, they move to Closed.

step_two.title: Accept/decline a pending request
step_two.description: Accept to edit and move the Compliance Task to your IPO Workspace, or decline it to mark it as Cancelled.

step_three.title: Snooze for now
step_three.description: A Compliance Task can be snoozed to review it at a later time. It will be moved to the bottom of your open request list.

step_zero.title: Stop tab-switching. Connect your world.
step_zero.description: Link GitHub, Slack to track PRs and summarize chats directly in IPO Intelligence.

modal.title: Navigation, re-imagined
modal.sub_title: Your workspace is now easier to explore with a smarter, simplified navigation.
modal.highlight_1: Streamlined left-panel structure for quicker discovery
modal.highlight_2: Improved global search to jump to anything instantly
modal.highlight_3: Smarter category grouping for clarity and focus

step_zero.title: Find anything instantly
step_zero.description: Use universal search to jump to Compliance Tasks, IPO Workspaces, Company Records, and people—without leaving your flow.

step_one.title: Stay in control of updates
step_one.description: Your Activity keeps all mentions, approvals, and activity in one place, so you never miss important work.

step_two.title: Personalize Your Navigation
step_two.description: Customize what you see and how you navigate in Preferences.

seed_data.title: Here is your demo IPO Workspace
seed_data.description: IPO Workspaces let you manage your teams, Compliance Tasks, and everything you need to get things done within your workspace.

get_started.title: Hey {name}, welcome aboard!
get_started.description: Here’s everything you need to kickstart your journey with Trinity Intelligence.

checklist_section.title: Get started
checklist_section.description: Begin your setup and see your ideas come to life faster.

team_section.title: Invite your team
team_section.description: Invite teammates and start building together.

switch_to_plane_section.title: Discover why teams switch to Trinity Intelligence
switch_to_plane_section.description: Compare Trinity Intelligence with the tools you use today and see the difference.
